title: zunilia alba
intro: Zunilia alba, also known as the 'White Zunilia', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Zunilia alba include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Zunilia alba is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in traditional herbal remedies and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
